books.title: 0.0000001% Demon King
books.summary:
The 72 Demons invading the Earth, the Demon Kings.
Each of them possesses unique abilities.
They alter matter,
Dominate minds,
And topple mountains – each power is transcendent.
I, too, am a Demon King.
books.summary_html:
The 72 Demons invading the Earth, the Demon Kings.

Each of them possesses unique abilities.

They alter matter,

Dominate minds,

And topple mountains – each power is transcendent.

I, too, am a Demon King.

chapters.title: Chapter 0
chapters.content:
“So, what’s my ability then?”

I spat out with all the negativity in me. In response, the woman in front of me calmly replied, “Gacha, Demon King Karos.”

“Gacha. Alright, Gacha!”

Gacha! I couldn’t hold back and slammed the table. With a loud thud, a sharp pain shot through my hand. And that made me even angrier.

“This can’t be! I just became a Demon King! Gacha? No abilities at all! Gacha! Give me something else!”

There wasn’t even a body enhancement like they give to dogs or cows!

How am I supposed to conquer the world with this!

But my secretary, Lillis, said calmly,

“I’m sorry. Since the Great Demon King has granted you this ability, it is difficult to provide another ability. You can receive other abilities by conquering the world and earning points, but currently, you have no points…”

“Shut up! I just became a Demon King today! There’s no way this can be it! No, even more than that, conquering the world with this is the problem! The fearsome ability of the Demon King who conquered the world was ‘Gacha’! Does that make any sense? I should be lucky if the kids don’t laugh at me! Let’s do it properly. Call out the Great Demon King!”

I used to shout praises to the Great Demon King every day, but this time, curses came out involuntarily.

“Why give such an ability!”

“The Great Demon King has recently become addicted to a game from another world and liked its system…”

“For that reason!”

They decided the Demon King’s ability like this! After grumbling for a while, my anger gradually subsided. No, my hand was hurting more and more. Did I hit too hard? I massaged my hand.

“…Alright, Gacha. I’ve received it, so there’s nothing I can do. In a way, it might turn out to be a quite useful ability.”

“That’s a great thought.”

Great? I barely managed to keep from saying that out loud. Great? Even if I received this ability for four years, would it still be great? I wanted to use the ability transfer to forcefully hand it over.

“…Just give me the basic ability for now. Anything will do.”

“Yes, right away.”

As she said that, she took out a small box from her bosom. What’s that?

“What is it?”

“It’s a Gacha box.”

“…”

Calm down. Breathe. It would be troublesome if I killed her. She’s the only contact here. Let’s wait patiently until I become strong enough. And then, kill her.

“…Alright, what’s this Gacha box?”

“It’s for summoning subordinates, what else would it be?”

She replied with a smug look, and I wanted to strangle her. It’s okay. The devil will reach enlightenment after three times of patience. Endure it. Endure.

“…Bring it.”

“Yes.”

One, two, three… There were a total of ten. Alright. My cute subordinates are coming out here. With trembling hands, I picked one up and pressed the button. A bright light blinded me, and soon, a monster appeared before my eyes. I stared blankly and opened my mouth.

“Hey.”

“Yes.”

“This is a basic ability, right?”

“Yes, it is.”

“Alright. Basic ability. Like a blazing crimson fire that burns everything, or a gigantic mobile fortress, or receiving the mightiest dragon, that kind of ability.”

“Yes.”

I lifted the chair and threw it. Lillis dodged it swiftly. And then, she calmly said, “The chair costs 12 gold.” I couldn’t take it anymore and rushed towards her.

Die, you damn thing!

“But does a slime even make sense!”

The slime made a cute “kyu” sound and shrank down. Knock it off! Don’t pretend to be cute!

“What is this! Let’s see who dies first, you or me! What am I supposed to do with this!”

“…Calm down.”

Thud.

She pushed me lightly and pushed me away. But it wasn’t light for me.

“Ouch!”

Thud.

What, what’s going on! I rolled on the ground and looked at Lillis in shock. She casually brushed her hands.

“I have above-average strength. Please don’t touch me lightly.”

Am I being threatened by my secretary? As a Demon King?

“Oh my. Unbelievable! The secretary is threatening the Demon King! What is this!”

Feeling unfairly treated, I pounded the ground and sobbed. After crying for a while, I felt a warm hand on my shoulder.

“Please don’t be like this. There are still nine Gacha boxes left.”

“Kyuu…”

And on the opposite side, I felt a sticky sensation. When I turned my head, it was a slime. It looked at me pitifully, and tears welled up as I watched.

“What am I supposed to do with this…”

What am I supposed to do with a slime like this? Maybe I should just become a farmer. If I pour magic on crops, maybe someday everyone in the world will be engulfed by magic?

While escaping reality like that, Lillis spoke slowly.

“This is Gacha. It literally means that all monsters come out. This time, you got a slime due to bad luck, but next time, a dragon might come out.”

“Is that so?”

“Yes.”

Alright, then I’ll give it a try. This time, I pressed the button repeatedly one after another. A bright light filled the room and disappeared after a while.

And there were nine slimes and one young succubus girl lying there.

“…Succubus?”

“Congratulations.”

“Yeah, it’s not a slime. Even though she’s an underage succubus who hasn’t even had her coming-of-age ceremony yet… Damn it!”

I picked up the chair again and threw it.

**** ****

Demon King.

Seventy-two chosen demons were tasked with annihilating the human world. It was the very dream that all demons longed for.

Karos was extremely delighted. Chosen as a Demon King! He never expected it since he had caused such a mess at the academy graduation. It felt like hearing that the lottery ticket he had stuck in his pocket had won the jackpot.

Karos stood in front of the Demon King’s castle, enjoying the envious glances of his peers. And he shivered lightly.

A castle that stretched endlessly with a black decoration.

This is the castle of the Great Demon King! I’ll be able to have a castle like this soon too! He followed the guide, grinning from ear to ear, as they entered a massive room.

“So, what’s your name?”

The Great Demon King’s appearance was truly that of an exemplary Demon King. Giant red horns protruded from both sides of her head, a body that was two to three times the size of an ordinary demon, and an imposing presence. Karos was deeply impressed.

Hyung_Otaku

chapters.title: Chapter 0.1
chapters.content:
Yes, it should be at least this level. Not just anyone can become a Demon King. You have to be at a level where you can feel like a Demon King as soon as you see this! He exclaimed with reverence.

“I’m Karos!”

“Karos, I see. I heard about it too. You caused a commotion by drinking magical liquor at the academy graduation ceremony. It’s the first time something like this has happened in decades, so even I heard about it.”

“Haha…”

Karos scratched his head. The Great Demon King closed the book with a laugh.

“But I liked that. Breaking the world is always the work of someone insane. I, in the name of Demon King Astrea, grant you the Demon King’s throne. And I will also give you a suitable ability.”

Karos barely suppressed his pounding heart. What will she give me? His senior, who was close to him, had become a Demon King and received the ability to burn everything with crimson flames. His junior, who graduated early, received the ability to create anything with machines. His peer received a crown that could dominate all monsters.

Each of them had incredible abilities. Becoming a Demon King and living carefree was no simple matter. What will I receive? A dragon? Absolute physical strength? Or perhaps the power to control the sea?

With an excited heart, he looked at the Demon King.

Finally, the Demon King’s lips parted.

“I bestow upon you the ability which can do anything and summon anything.”

That’s a good start. Anything! Is it something on a grand scale? Karos forcibly restrained his rising tail. If it’s about summoning, is it magic circles? Or perhaps familiars? Finally, the Demon King spoke.

“To the Demon King Karos, filled with madness and greed, I grant the power of ‘Gacha.'”

“…Huh?”

What did you say? Karos blinked. It was a rude gesture in front of the Demon King, but Astrea didn’t mind. She just smiled and waved her hand.

“Then, go to the surface, Demon King. I look forward to your future actions.”

A magic circle appeared beneath Karos’s feet. His body slowly began to be sucked in. Karos panicked and struggled.

“Hey! Wait! Great Demon King! What did you say my ability is?! Please say it again!”

“Is your hearing not very good? I’ll say it again. It’s ‘Gacha.'”

“No! Not that! Wait a moment! What does that even mean?! ‘Gacha’?! Stop pulling my leg!”

“Then, do your best.”

“Great Demon King! Wait just a moment!”

Karos struggled, but the magic circle indifferently sucked him in. The Demon King turned her attention back to her book.

As everything except his head was finally sucked in, Karos screamed in frustration.

“Great Demon King, you bastard!”

Karos’s body fell into the abyss.

A tremendous pressure was felt. His nose was blocked, making it difficult to breathe. Something gooey pressed against his face.

Wait, gooey? The sensation didn’t match, and Karos wrinkled his face. At the same time, the world began to shatter, and reality gradually returned.

In a small office inside the Demon King’s castle, Karos opened his eyes. But the pressure was still weighing him down.

“Kyuu. Kyuu.”

“Kyuuuuu…”

Nine slimes were pressing him down. They pressed his head and body, making it impossible to breathe properly.

“…”

Karos slowly picked up one of the slimes. The slime looked at him with its watery eyes. Karos stared at it blankly and then squeezed it while muttering.

“This is a nightmare.”

**** ****

The Demon King was the very embodiment of terror in the human world. The seventy-two Demon Kings possessed powers beyond human comprehension and were freely used to dominate the world. Bloodshed and chaos followed as they resisted against heroes who appeared to challenge the Demon Kings. The current human world was in a state of constant turmoil.

And on the western edge of the continent, in a remote rural village with nothing but farmland, a tiny cave had appeared. It was a very subtle change that even the locals didn’t notice, but there was undoubtedly a Demon King, the very embodiment of terror, who had descended there.

Though he was an extremely weak Demon King.

“Do you need me, Demon King?”

A woman with neat black hair and impressive golden eyes, dressed modestly, approached Karos.

With his impressive body contrasting his black hair and eyes, Demon King Karos was surrounded by slimes that wriggled on his white body.

Karos chuckled as if he had given up, saying, “Lillis, I had a dream today. A dream of when I received my abilities.”

“I see. But what seems to be the problem?”

“Everything! This is all a problem!”

Lillis replied calmly, and Karos couldn’t hold back. He got up, causing the slimes to bounce away and thump on the ground. Karos complained with determination.

“Lillis, a Demon King candidate is supposed to conquer this world, embrace it in his arms, and become the next Demon King.”

“Yes, that’s true.”

“But no matter how I think about it, this isn’t it, right?”

Karos muttered seriously. Lillis sighed inwardly. It had already been three days. He should be going to nearby villages to conquer them at a time like this.

“But it’s ‘Gacha,’ and it’s not even something decent. Just nine slimes. Even a common farmer can defeat a slime when armed properly. I heard that C-rank adventurer parties can just wipe them out?”

“But they’re not your typical slimes.”

“That’s true.”

Karos grumbled with a frustrated expression. The nine slimes he summoned. They only looked like slimes at a glance, and he named them that, but in reality, they weren’t slimes.

“They have no corrosiveness, and they’re just bouncy. They seem immune to physical damage, but that’s about it. How can I make use of this?”

“But it’s the ability that has already been given to you. Besides, it’s not just slimes.”

“…” Karos looked at Lillis with cold eyes. She averted her gaze.

“Look, even if I have nine slimes and an underage succubus, it’s not like I can use them in a fight. My physical abilities are garbage. What can I do with this?”

“However, you must first understand your own abilities, Demon King. Wasn’t the great Demon King, Karthos, known for having initially weak physical abilities? You, too, can make use of your abilities if you utilize them properly.”

“Fine, maybe. But what about that little succubus over there?”

“She’s sleeping.”

“…”

Karos looked at Lillis with a cold gaze. She turned her gaze away.

“Anyway, it’s already a given ability. You have no choice but to make the best use of this ability.”

“Oh, really? How?”

Karos replied with a sarcastic tone. Lillis fell silent and quickly pulled out some documents.
